content:
# Recommendations — after iter-043 (for iter-044 plan)

## CRITICAL — root privacy gate is REAL (do not re-litigate)
- **B1 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` and its dependents S2 → S4b → telescope CANNOT be closed from `TensorObjInverse.lean`** until the root δ-conjugation is made visible. Verified (grep, this review): `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (L4678), `deltaConjOfMuComparison` (L4624), `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` (L4750), `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (+`_lhs/_rhs_tmul`, L4573/4354/4326) are all **`private`** in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`. Only `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` (L4770) is public, and it supplies invertibility, NOT the equation.
- **The "B1 unblocked / witness always public" premise in the iter-043 plan and Archon memory is FALSE.** Update ARCHON_MEMORY to state the privacy gate as established. Stop flip-flopping (041 said blocked, 043 plan said false-premise, 043 prover re-confirmed blocked).
- **Cheapest unblock — a one-line root edit by the mathematician / a `refactor` lane:** remove `private` from `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` and `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (frozen root → planner decision; this is an ADDITIVE visibility change, no signature/proof change, so within `refactor` subagent scope). Re-deriving the chain downstream ≈ re-proving `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` (~200 LOC) — DO NOT take that path.
- **Action for planner:** dispatch `refactor` to de-`private` the two root lemmas THIS iter (root is green/frozen; additive visibility edit is race-safe if run SOLO). Once landed + `lake build` green, B1/S2/S4b become genuinely ready.

## Closest-to-completion / highest-value next target
- **B2 `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat` (L196)** — the ONE fully-unblocked sorry (no root dependency). Prover reduced it to an explicit mate-coherence residual: LHS = `(pullbackPushforwardAdjunction V.ι).unit.app A`; RHS = pseudofunctoriality unit-coherence over legs c₁..c₆. Residual ≈ **80-120 LOC** of `mateEquiv_vcomp` / `leftAdjointUniq_trans` threading across three differing right adjoints + `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` + the `pullbackCongr hjι` eqToHom.
  - **Recommended: dispatch `effort-breaker` on B2 first** (granularity "one level"), splitting the c₁..c₆ leg-coherence into per-leg sub-lemmas, THEN a `prove`/fine-grained prover. The monolithic mate-chase has resisted a single-pass close; per-leg decomposition is the textbook move.
  - Closing B2 also keeps S4c (L372) closed and is independent of the root unblock — it can run in PARALLEL with the refactor lane.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as-is
- **B1 / S2 / S4b / telescope** — blocked on root privacy (above). Do not send a prover until the refactor lands.
- **S3 / S4a (dual route)** — deep (route-b thin-poset `subsingleton` UNVERIFIED; route-a `pullbackDualMap` cone ~150-250 LOC). Before any prover: have `mathlib-analogist` (cross-domain) or a scoped probe VERIFY the route-b `subsingleton` shortcut is real; if not, `effort-breaker` route-a. Not a blind prover target.

## DEAD approaches (do not retry)
- `subst hjι` / `clear_value j` to remove the `j ≫ U.ι = V.ι` chart shim — j is a plain parameter, V.ι compound; the `pullbackCongr hjι` eqToHom MUST be threaded explicitly.
- Coherence `simp` (`← Functor.map_comp`, `restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app`, …) alone to close the B2 RHS — merges legs, never discharges.

## Reviewer must-fixes landed / pending
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker must-fix (B1 proof route through private lemmas) → `% NOTE:` applied to the blueprint B1 proof block this review. No further writer action needed unless the route is changed.
- lean-auditor "real sorry count likely 9" → **REFUTED** by authoritative lake build (exactly 7; L372/L586 carry no transitive sorry). No action; record that LSP over-counted.
- lean-auditor minor: B1 is dead code (no call site; S2 consumer sorry) — expected/architectural, no action.

## Coverage debt (1-to-1)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **104 lean_aux nodes with no blueprint entry** (pre-existing; the prover added 0 new declarations this iter, so no NEW debt). This is a standing backlog (helpers in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` + siblings). Not urgent for the active frontier, but the planner should schedule a blueprint-writer sweep to restore correspondence before the polish stage. Examples: `comp_cancel_mid`, `comp_slide_three`, `sheafifyUnitIso`, `restrictIsoUnitOfLE`, `inv_telescope`, `isIso_sheafifyEta_of_unitSquare`, `linearEndo_apply_comm`, … (full list via `archon dag-query unmatched --json`).

## Structural
- blueprint-doctor: clean (0 findings).
- B2 can run as a SOLO prover lane in parallel with the refactor de-private lane (different files; root edit additive). After refactor lands + green, B1/S2/S4b open up for iter-045.
